column1: Contracts sheet — data dictionary for LLM consumers

Each row in 'Contracts' = one real-estate purchase contract (872 total). The buyer pays the total price in up to 4 installments (Вноска 1..4). Each installment is the sum of payments triggered by up to 8 contractual events: ДГ (down payment), ПД (preliminary contract), СМР Банка (construction — bank-financed), СМР Кеш (construction — cash), Доплащане 1, Доплащане 2, Нотариален акт (notary deed), Договор за заем (loan agreement). Not every event occurs for every contract; blanks mean the event did not contribute to that installment. All monetary values are in EUR.

column6: Description
Contract title. Format: '<buyer>-<building>-<apartment/unit>'. Free-text, uniquely identifies a contract.
Buyer's full legal name.
Salesperson / broker who closed the deal.
Whether the contract was signed before ('Преди') or after ('След') building completion.
Name of the building/development the unit is in.
Unit composition/status code. Examples: 'А' (apartment only), 'А+Г/ПМ' (apartment + garage or parking).
Total contract price owed by the buyer.
Whether the purchase is financed with a bank loan: 'Да' (yes) or 'Не' (no).
Total amount due for the first installment of this contract.
Total amount paid toward the first installment. Equals the sum of the 8 event-amount columns in this block.
Remaining unpaid amount for the first installment = installment_1_due − installment_1_paid.
Amount contributed by the 'ДГ' event to the first installment. Initial down payment (deposit) event. Blank = this event did not contribute to this installment.
Date on which the 'ДГ' payment for the first installment was made (or is scheduled). Blank if event did not contribute to this installment.
Amount contributed by the 'ПД' event to the first installment. Preliminary contract signing payment. Blank = this event did not contribute to this installment.
Date on which the 'ПД' payment for the first installment was made (or is scheduled). Blank if event did not contribute to this installment.
Amount contributed by the 'СМР Банка' event to the first installment. Construction milestone payment funded via bank loan. Blank = this event did not contribute to this installment.
Date on which the 'СМР Банка' payment for the first installment was made (or is scheduled). Blank if event did not contribute to this installment.

Live SUM of the 8 event amounts in this installment block. Used for validation; should equal installment_1_paid.
Validation delta = installment_1_computed_sum − installment_1_paid. Should be 0; non-zero values flagged in red indicate a data inconsistency.

column1: Contract: 'Людмил Икономов-Царевец-ап.27, вх.А и гараж 18 и гараж 19'
• Total due (Обща дължима сума) = €148,590.00, no bank credit.
(All other events blank for this installment.)
• Validation: 39,407.18 + 34,770.50 = 74,177.68 → matches 'Първа вноска платено' exactly → Δ (В1) = 0.
1. A blank event-amount cell means that event did not contribute to that installment — NOT zero and NOT missing data.
2. 'installment_N_paid' is the source-of-truth summary. The event columns are the breakdown; they always sum to it (Δ = 0 across all 872 contracts).
3. Not all 8 events appear in every contract. Typical contracts use 5–7 events; 'Договор за заем' appears in only ~20 contracts.
4. An event can contribute to multiple installments (e.g. СМР Кеш might have amounts in both В1 and В2 columns).
5. Dates are Excel serial dates, formatted yyyy-mm-dd. All amounts are EUR.
